response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of low-level hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Proven track record in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Demonstrated ability to lead and teach through workshops and community projects
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP modeling, or AI accelerator hardware optimization
Lacks exposure to deep learning workload analysis or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware/performance specialization
